option_a.result_text:
At dawn, grain carts entered the crowded districts and the ledgers were opened. By Senate decree, Plebeian households received fresh coin, and the alleys rang with rare relief.
Plebeian representatives +2 gold.

option_b.result_text:
Under torchlight, sealed purses were carried to Patrician villas. Gold favored old blood and noble names, while Caesar stood apart and watched the balance tilt.
Patrician representatives +4 gold.

option_a.text: A random Plebeian representative receives 1 assassination token
option_a.result_text:
Beneath the Forum and beyond magistrates' eyes, a Plebeian envoy met in shadow. They emerged with a sealed token, and whispers spread that a cloaked blade now served their call.
+1 Ass. token given to a random Plebeian.

option_b.text: All players pay 3 gold toward civic repairs
option_b.result_text:
The Colosseum's outer stone has cracked, and engineers warned of ruin if repairs were delayed. Heralds went door to door, and every citizen was compelled to surrender 3 gold.
All players lose 3 gold.

option_a.result_text:
In the palace's inner chambers, Caesar received a hooded visitor who spoke no name. A sealed token was pressed into his hand — with it, the authority to silence one voice permanently. By morning, the guards had changed their routes.
Ass. token given to Caesar.

option_b.text: A random Plebeian gains an assassination token and each Plebeian gains 2 gold
option_b.result_text:
The Plebeian quarters stirred with new purpose. Coin flowed from sympathetic merchants, and in a wine-stained back room, a dagger was wrapped in cloth and passed to trembling hands. The common folk were done waiting.
+1 Ass. token given to a random Plebeian. Plebeian representatives +2 gold.

option_a.text: Each Patrician gains 3 gold from eastern trade routes
option_a.result_text:
Silk caravans arrived through the eastern gates, and Patrician merchants collected their shares first. The warehouses swelled with goods, and old families counted new fortunes behind marble walls.
Patrician representatives +3 gold.

option_b.text: All players pay 2 gold in harbor tariffs
option_b.result_text:
New tariffs were posted at every dock and gate. Merchants grumbled, soldiers collected, and the treasury grew heavier while purses across the city grew thin.
All players lose 2 gold.

option_a.text: Each Plebeian gains 3 gold from labor contracts
option_a.result_text:
New construction on the Via Appia demanded hands by the thousand. Plebeian laborers were paid fairly for once, and the foremen's ledgers showed honest coin beside calloused names.
Plebeian representatives +3 gold.

option_b.text: A random Patrician receives an assassination token
option_b.result_text:
A restless Patrician met with foreign agents beyond the city walls. What was exchanged is unknown, but a sealed token now rests in noble hands, and certain senators have begun sleeping behind locked doors.
+1 Ass. token given to a random Patrician.

option_a.text: Caesar gains 6 gold from military tributes
option_a.result_text:
Legions returning from the frontier marched through the Forum bearing chests of plundered silver. Caesar claimed his share before the Senate could speak — as was his right, he said, and none dared challenge it.
Caesar +6 gold.

option_b.text: Each Patrician gains 2 gold and all players pay 2 gold in war levies
option_b.result_text:
The Senate voted to fund a new campaign along the Rhine. Every household owed a levy to the war effort, though Patrician families quietly received stipends for their 'administrative contributions' to the cause.
Patrician representatives +2 gold. All players lose 2 gold.

option_a.text: All players pay 4 gold for public games
option_a.result_text:
The Ludi Romani were declared with such grandeur that even senators winced at the cost. Gladiators fought, chariots raced, and the crowd roared — but every citizen paid dearly for the spectacle.
All players lose 4 gold.

option_b.text: Each Plebeian gains 4 gold from festival earnings
option_b.result_text:
Street vendors, performers, and craftsmen thrived as festival-goers spent freely. For once, gold flowed downward — from marble steps to mud-packed streets — and Plebeian hands caught every coin.
Plebeian representatives +4 gold.

option_a.text: Each Patrician gains 5 gold from land seizures
option_a.result_text:
Disputed farmlands outside the city were awarded to Patrician families by senatorial decree. Tenants were evicted, boundaries redrawn, and the rents began flowing before the ink had dried.
Patrician representatives +5 gold.

option_b.text: A random Plebeian receives an assassination token
option_b.result_text:
Anger over the Senate's greed reached a boiling point in the lower quarters. A hooded figure was seen leaving a Plebeian dwelling at dawn, and now someone among the common folk carries a dark commission.
+1 Ass. token given to a random Plebeian.

option_a.text: Each Plebeian gains 2 gold and a random Patrician receives an assassination token
option_a.result_text:
The People's Tribune rallied the lower wards with promises of justice and coin. Plebeian households received their share, but in the shadows, a Patrician was handed a sealed token — the Tribune's insurance against betrayal.
Plebeian representatives +2 gold. +1 Ass. token given to a random Patrician.

option_b.text: All players pay 3 gold for aqueduct repairs
option_b.result_text:
Cracks in the great aqueduct threatened the city's water supply. Engineers demanded immediate funding, and the Senate compelled every citizen to contribute — no exceptions, no deferrals.
All players lose 3 gold.

option_a.result_text:
Whispers reached the palace of a conspiracy among senators. Caesar, ever cautious, summoned his own agents. By nightfall a sealed token was in his possession — not for defense, he said, but for order.
Ass. token given to Caesar.

option_b.text: Each Patrician gains 4 gold from provincial taxes
option_b.result_text:
Tax collectors returned from the provinces bearing heavy coffers. The Senate divided the spoils among its own, and Patrician vaults deepened while distant villages tightened their belts.
Patrician representatives +4 gold.
